{{Missing Info|specifics=Mirage 5s name, 6s name}}
{{CargoRelic
|name=Voyager 1
|rank=SSS
|affct=TECH
|birthday=03-16
|source=Wish Box, Lottery Machine (0.09%), Wishing (0.07%), Murikan Treasure Maps (0.01%), Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF)
|description=On Mar 16, 2013 AD, Voyager 1 arrived at the heliopause and was ready to enter space. Forty years ago, Voyager 1 was launced into the universe. Its battery ensures it will continue for a few more years. Once the battery depletes, it will continue towards the centre of the galaxy and never return.

[Basic Info]

Launch location: Cape Canaveral, Floridar launch base

Launch vehicle: Titan III E Centaur rocket

Destination planet: Jupiter, Saturn, outer solar system

Power consumption: 420 watts

Current status: In the outermost boundary of the solar system

Energy: Isotopic thermoelectric generator

Mass: 815kg

|fame=55
|art=73
|fth=67
|civ=58
|tech=109
|ss1=Snail RUSH +30<br>Travel SPD +0.6%<br>In explorations, 2x B-tad Drops +0.8%
|ss2=Snail RUSH +40<br>Travel SPD +0.8%<br>In explorations, 2x B-tad Drops +1.6%
|ss3=Snail RUSH +50<br>Travel SPD +1%<br>In explorations, 2x B-tad Drops +2%
|ss4=Snail RUSH +70<br>Travel SPD +1.4%<br>In explorations, 2x B-tad Drops +2.8%
|ss5=Snail RUSH +90<br>Travel SPD +1.8%<br>In explorations, 2x B-tad Drops +3.6%
|ss6=Snail RUSH +120<br>Travel SPD +2.4%<br>In explorations, 2x B-tad Drops +4.8%
|ss7=Snail RUSH +120<br>Travel SPD +2.4%<br>In explorations, 2x B-tad Drops +4.8%<br>Snail RUSH +100 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Compass skill III.png|50x50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: Snail ATK +600
|skill2=[[File:Compass skill III.png|50x50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: Snail RUSH +600
|skill3=[[File:Compass skill III.png|50x50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, 2x INTEL Drops +15%
|mirage={{#invoke:snailDB|parseMirage|{{PAGENAME}}}}
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Orange Relics]]
[[Category:TECH Relics]]
[[Category:Orange TECH Relics]]
[[Category:Exploration Compass Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration B-tad Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Travel Speed Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Rewards Relic]]
[[Category:Mechanic Boost]]
